title: Vanilla - Optimized
description: The Best Ressource Pack for Vanilla.
body:
# Vanilla - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the Best Vanilla experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particles:**

> **The Mace Breach/Density got a custom Texture** _(Release)_

> **The Spear got a better Texture** _(Release)_

> **The Sun/Moon has been removed is the sky.**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons** _(Release)_

> **The Grass/Bush has been set to invisible.**

> **The Totem Animation has been improved.** _(Not Fixed)_

> **All Block breack particle got removed.**  _(Soon)_

> **Some Sounds have been removed.** _(Release)_

> **Charge Indicator** _(Release)_

### Preview Gameplay

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f525b9dc174c0a5ef9ad07fb7eafaa119dc68e.png)

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **PvPClub** _(eu.mcpvp.club)_

> **McPrac** _(mcprac.net)_

> **CentralPvP**

> **CrystalRanked**

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got BLACKLISTED on PvPTiers. (Is Real)_**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8360183da905dee862a01cc156a0cf368807a7ff.png)

# VanillaOptimized By yKoseli
